creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Piotr Kubaj from comment #6)

The original problem is about facter not being build because the port depends by default on java and java was available because one of it's dependency was missing.

According to your URI, you are experiencing a build failure in facter itself, which is another problem.  May I suggest opening a new problem report to track this one?




FYI, the certificate served on your domain has just expired:

talos.anongoth.pl uses an invalid security certificate.

The certificate expired on January 13, 2019, 5:41:00 AM GMT-10. The current time is January 13, 2019, 8:31 AM.

Error code: SEC_ERROR_EXPIRED_CERTIFICATE
